heading: Employee organization representation
label: 3408 Employee organization representation
text: If an employee organization has been accorded exclusive recognition with respect to a unit within an agency, then the employee organization shall be entitled to represent all employees within that unit employed on a part-time career employment basis.
notes: Amendments1978— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 95–454section 3398 of this title
amendments: Amendments1978— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 95–454section 3398 of this title
